notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: collection/meta progression background for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate collection background for meta progression and unlock screens. Scene/backdrop: quiet arcane archive and treasure vault, shelves of relics, elemental plaques, sealed alcoves, soft magical dust. Subject: environment only, no characters, no UI, no text. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game background, refined and readable. Composition/framing: vertical mobile-friendly screen with calm central display space for collection cards and unlock panels. Lighting/mood: contemplative, rewarding, magical, less intense than combat. Color palette: deep stone, muted indigo, warm gold, small elemental highlights. Constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no UI overlay, no casino imagery, no gore.
